name: Mishra Dhatu Nigam Limited
summary: Mishra Dhatu Nigam Limited manufactures and sells special steels, super alloys, and titanium alloys in India and internationally. The company offers special steels, including martensitic steel, high strength special steel, austenitic steel, and precipitation hardening steel; nickel base, iron base, and cobalt base super alloys used in aeronautics, space, nuclear, chemical, petrochemical, power generation, and furnace industries; and titanium. It also provides soft magnetic and controlled expansion alloys; bars, bright bars, and wire/fine wire; and hot and cold rolled sheets, and strip, as well as open-die forging products. In addition, the company offers special weld consumables, fasteners, biomedical implants, and armour products. The company was founded in 1973 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
